title: docs/buildah-commit.md: tweak some wording, add a --rm example
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Tweak wording in `docs/buildah-commit.md` to avoid suggesting that we add the actual text "<none>:<none>" as a name for images when a name isn't specified to `buildah commit`.

Add an example that uses `--rm` to the list of examples in `docs/buildah-commit.md`.

#### How to verify it

Visual inspection.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
